query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscription_features (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  plan_id_sf INT NOT NULL,
  feature_key VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  enabled_sf TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
  limit_value INT,
  created_at_sf BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_sf_plan (plan_id_sf),
  INDEX idx_sf_key (feature_key)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS company_usage (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  company_id_cu INT NOT NULL,
  feature_key_cu VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  current_usage INT DEFAULT 0,
  usage_period VARCHAR(7),
  updated_at_cu BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uk_cu (company_id_cu, feature_key_cu, usage_period)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plan_change_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  company_id_pcl INT NOT NULL,
  from_plan_id INT,
  to_plan_id INT NOT NULL,
  change_type ENUM('upgrade','downgrade','cancel','renew','trial_start','manual') DEFAULT 'upgrade',
  change_reason TEXT,
  changed_by INT,
  changed_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_pcl_company (company_id_pcl)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscription_invoices (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  company_id_si INT NOT NULL,
  subscription_id_si INT NOT NULL,
  plan_id_si INT NOT NULL,
  inv_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  inv_currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'SAR',
  inv_status ENUM('paid','pending','failed','refunded') DEFAULT 'pending',
  inv_billing_cycle ENUM('monthly','yearly') DEFAULT 'monthly',
  period_start BIGINT,
  period_end BIGINT,
  paid_at_inv BIGINT,
  invoice_number VARCHAR(50),
  inv_notes TEXT,
  created_at_inv BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_si_company (company_id_si)
);

-- Add missing columns to subscriptions table
ALTER TABLE subscriptions 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS grace_period_days INT DEFAULT 7,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspended_at BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspend_reason TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS renewed_from_id INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS next_billing_date BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS metadata JSON;

-- Add missing columns to plans table  
ALTER TABLE plans
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_recommended TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trial_days INT DEFAULT 14,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS max_contracts INT DEFAULT 50,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS max_api_calls INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS feature_keys JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS limits_json JSON;
